title: APOE E2/E2 most likely; lower Alzheimer's risk
summary: APOE E2/E2 most likely; lower Alzheimer's risk
detail: Likely to have 2 copies of the ApoE2 allele, as long as rs7412 is not (C;C) or (C;T), and the lowest risk of Alzheimer's disease (among ApoE genotypes). Based on a statistical correlation in some populations; see discussion at rs445925. Presence of gs268 confirms E2/E2 status if present; most other ApoE genosets (such as gs270 or gs216) take precedence for establishing ApoE allele status over this rs445925 prediction if present.
